rows.notes: H30 docs should freeze H29/R36/R37 into one explicit no-momentum decision packet.
H30 only freezes positively if the H29/R36/R37 chain remains narrow and exact.
Later packets may supersede H30 as active routing, but the canonical driver and active-wave handoff should still preserve H30 explicitly.
H30 should preserve R29/F3 as blocked and keep F2 planning-only.
